2604.06779.title: FVD: Inference-Time Alignment of Diffusion Models via Fleming-Viot Resampling
2604.06779.paper_summary: We introduce Fleming-Viot Diffusion (FVD), an inference-time alignment method that resolves the diversity collapse commonly observed in Sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) based diffusion samplers. Existing SMC-based diffusion samplers often rely on multinomial resampling or closely related resampling schemes, which can still reduce diversity and lead to lineage collapse under strong selection pressure. Inspired by Fleming-Viot population dynamics, FVD replaces multinomial resampling with a specialized birth-death mechanism designed for diffusion alignment. To handle cases where rewards are only approximately available and naive rebirth would collapse deterministic trajectories, FVD integrates independent reward-based survival decisions with stochastic rebirth noise. This yields flexible population dynamics that preserve broader trajectory support while effectively exploring reward-tilted distributions, all without requiring value function approximation or costly rollouts. FVD is fully parallelizable and scales efficiently with inference compute. Empirically, it achieves substantial gains across settings: on DrawBench it outperforms prior methods by 7% in ImageReward, while on class-conditional tasks it improves FID by roughly 14-20% over strong baselines and is up to 66 times faster than value-based approaches.
2604.06779.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了Fleming-Viot擴散（FVD），這是一種推斷時對齊方法，可以解決在基於序列蒙特卡羅（SMC）的擴散取樣器中常見的多樣性崩潰問題。現有的基於SMC的擴散取樣器通常依賴於多項式重取樣或密切相關的重取樣方案，這可能仍會降低多樣性並在強選擇壓力下導致系譜崩潰。受到Fleming-Viot人口動力學的啟發，FVD用專門的出生-死亡機制取代了多項式重取樣，該機制旨在實現擴散對齊。為了處理獎勵僅大致可用且天真的重生會崩潰確定性軌跡的情況，FVD將獨立的基於獎勵的生存決策與隨機重生噪聲相結合。這產生了靈活的人口動力學，能夠保留更廣泛的軌跡支持，同時有效地探索獎勵傾斜的分佈，所有這些都不需要價值函數近似或昂貴的展開。FVD是完全可並行化的，並且在推斷計算中有效擴展。實證上，它在各種設置中實現了顯著的增益：在DrawBench上，它在ImageReward中比之前的方法提高了7%，而在類條件任務中，它在強基準上改善了約14-20%的FID，並且比基於價值的方法快多達66倍。
2604.06779.author: Shivanshu Shekhar et.al.
2604.06779.authors: Shivanshu Shekhar, Sagnik Mukherjee, Jia Yi Zhang, Tong Zhang
